findings.title: SmarterMail RCE Flaws Rapidly Weaponized — Ransomware Activity Confirmed
findings.summary: Two critical SmarterMail RCEs with public PoCs on Telegram, 1000+ vulnerable servers, tied to ransomware campaigns.

findings.title: Honeywell CCTV Authentication Bypass — Critical Infrastructure at Risk
findings.summary: Critical auth bypass in Honeywell CCTV allows unauthorized feed access or account hijacking at critical infrastructure sites.

findings.title: AI Platforms Abused as Covert C2 Channels
findings.affected_technology: Grok, Microsoft Copilot, AI assistants with web browsing
findings.summary: AI assistants with web browsing can be abused as C2 proxies, making malicious traffic invisible to traditional monitoring.

findings.title: Cline CLI Supply Chain Attack Installs OpenClaw on Developer Machines
findings.summary: Compromised npm token pushed Cline CLI v2.3.0 with postinstall script silently installing OpenClaw on developer machines.

noted.summary: DLP bypass bug let Copilot summarize confidential emails. Fixed Feb 3.
